title: hieracium alatum subsp. thlaspidifolium
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. thlaspidifolium, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium alatum subsp. thlaspidifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Hieracium alatum subsp. thlaspidifolium is used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
